ogTitle: Baryulgil vs Bass Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Baryulgil and Bass Hill.
heading: Baryulgil vs Bass Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Baryulgil, New South Wales and Bass Hill, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Baryulgil has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Bass Hill (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Baryulgil or Bass Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Baryulgil has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Bass Hill scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Baryulgil scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Bass Hill scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Baryulgil or Bass Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Baryulgil has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
